name: souroldgeezer-ops
description: Operations skills for issue and work-item lifecycle handling, with a tracker-agnostic core and provider-specific extensions.

interface.longDescription: Handle explicit issue and work-item lifecycle requests with a tracker-agnostic core, provider-specific extensions, lifecycle markers, escalation gates, and verification discipline.
defaultPrompt: Use issue-ops to triage this issue queue.
Use issue-ops to resume this issue lifecycle.
Use issue-ops to handle this GitHub™ issue end to end.
